/CAL: TO SET OR DISPO/15    GDIV ELIG RPT DEFER ENTRY/TEXT:DEFERD ENTRY OFJDGMNT; DEF ENTS NOLO PLEA & REFRD TO DIVERSN/DEFT ADV NL:1/NOLO/GTW/CPSS/ARBUCKLE/DNA/X: PRU-103 FILED IN OPEN COURT,/X: IF DEFENDANT OBEYS ALLLAWS FOR 1 YEAR, FELONY CONVICTION WILL BE REDUCED TO A MISDEMEANOR AND DEFENDANT WILL BE SENTENCED ON MISDEMEANOR, IF DEFENDANT FAILS, SHE WILL BE SENTENCED ON FELONY,/X: PROPOSED DISPO IF DEFENDANT IS SUCCESSFUL:/X: ISS, 3YR CT PROB, 5 D CJ(MAY BE SERVED THROUGH SWAP), CTS TBDLCHEM, $390 BASE FINE PLUS ASSESSMENTS, VF2: 150, PROBFINE, COA, ICNA, EMAT,/TWS/CONTD: TO SET SENTENCING/DOP/

/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/X:DEFENSE MOTION TO REMOVE SCRAM MONITORING IS GRANTED/CTORD:SCRAM MONITORING REQUIREMENTS OF RELEASE IS TERMINATED/X:ALLOTHER ORDERS REMAIN IN FULL FORCE AND EFFECT/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO COMPLETE4 AA MEETINGS PER WEEK/CONT/DOP/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW60/X:AS A CONDITION OF BAIL, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A SCRAM DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESSDAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/LDPX:12-17-19/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
